articles.title: Fifa enters prediction markets with ADI Predictstreet deal
articles.summary: FIFA just signed a deal with ADI Predictstreet to officially enter the prediction markets space, bringing the world's biggest soccer organization into the forecasting game. This legitimizes prediction markets in a massive way and opens the door for other major sports bodies to follow suit, potentially creating a new revenue stream worth hundreds of millions.

articles.title: Is the Stock Market About to Fall Sharply? Prediction Markets Flash a Warning, but Wall Street Sees Buying Opportunities.
articles.summary: Prediction markets are signaling a sharp stock market decline while traditional Wall Street analysts remain bullish and see current prices as buying opportunities. This disconnect creates a rare arbitrage opportunity for savvy bettors who can profit from the gap between prediction market pessimism and institutional investor optimism.

articles.title: What will Trump say during news conference on April 6? P...
articles.summary: Bettors are wagering on what Trump will say during his April 6 news conference, turning presidential soundbites into actionable predictions. These markets offer early signals on Trump's messaging strategy and potential policy pivots that could move broader political betting odds.

articles.title: Polymarket Readies Platform Overhaul With New Collateral Token
articles.summary: Polymarket is overhauling its platform with a new collateral token, moving away from its current USDC-only system. This could slash transaction fees and attract more international users who've been priced out by Ethereum gas costs and stablecoin restrictions.

articles.title: Polymarket reveals a 'full exchange upgrade' to take control of its own trading and truth
articles.summary: Polymarket is launching a major platform overhaul that will give them direct control over both trade execution and outcome resolution instead of relying on third-party infrastructure. This shift could eliminate the friction and delays that have plagued the platform, making it faster and more reliable for high-stakes political betting when every minute counts.

articles.title: Federal-state showdown looms over regulation of prediction markets
articles.summary: Federal and state regulators are gearing up for a turf war over who gets to control prediction markets as the industry explodes in popularity. The outcome will determine whether we get a patchwork of conflicting state rules or unified federal oversight that could either unleash or strangle the nascent betting-on-everything economy.

articles.title: New Jersey cannot regulate Kalshi's prediction market, US appeals court rules
articles.summary: A federal appeals court ruled that New Jersey lacks authority to regulate Kalshi's prediction markets, blocking the state's regulatory interference. The decision strengthens prediction markets' legal standing and signals that federal oversight trumps state-level attempts to shut down legitimate betting platforms.

articles.title: Polymarket criticized over ‘disgusting’ bets on fate of pilots on US jet shot by Iran
articles.summary: Polymarket faced backlash for hosting prediction markets on whether pilots would survive after Iran shot down a US military aircraft. The controversy highlights how quickly betting platforms can cross ethical lines when real-time tragedy meets speculative markets, potentially triggering regulatory scrutiny that could reshape what events are deemed appropriate for prediction betting.

articles.title: Stefon Diggs' Next Team Has a Frontrunner: What Kalshi's Market Says Now
articles.summary: Kalshi traders are betting heavily on where NFL star Stefon Diggs will land next, with one team emerging as the clear favorite in the prediction market. The early market movement signals smart money may have inside information about trade negotiations, making this a bellwether for how sports betting markets price roster moves before they're official.

articles.title: Prediction markets signal a prolonged Middle East conflict as oil risks mount
articles.summary: Prediction markets are pricing in an extended Middle East conflict, with traders betting on sustained regional instability that could drive oil prices significantly higher. Smart money is positioning for energy sector volatility while geopolitical prediction markets offer some of the clearest real-time intelligence on how long this mess actually lasts.

articles.title: Polymarket apologizes, takes down wager on US pilot’s rescue
articles.summary: Polymarket pulled a betting market on whether a downed US military pilot would be successfully rescued, issuing an apology for the controversial wager. The move highlights how prediction platforms struggle to balance free market principles with public sensitivity around life-or-death situations involving real people.

articles.title: ‘Dystopian death market’: Polymarket halts bets regarding US airman after Moulton condemns site
articles.summary: Polymarket suspended betting markets related to a US airman's death after facing criticism from Representative Seth Moulton, who called the platform a "dystopian death market." The controversy highlights growing regulatory pressure on prediction markets that touch sensitive topics, potentially forcing platforms to narrow their scope to avoid political backlash.
